notes: Frozen pretrained embeddings for the CCLE/PRISM external-eval drug set (omicsdrp ablation drug-encoder variants only -- DeepTTA/PaccMann consume raw SMILES directly). Reproduction validated against the original GDSC2 chemberta.npy/molformer.npy row 0 (Camptothecin): max abs diff <1e-6. float32; row i == prism_name row i in PRISM_drug_smiles.csv.
